Interface IMapServerLegendPatch

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto

ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the Map Server Legend Patch Interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E8807B4F-A2ED-43CB-954F-73B7ECD94422")]
